channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Plaid Cymru and Reform UK emerge as frontrunners ahead of Senedd election, new polling suggests
item.description: Rhun ap Iorwerth has framed May’s Senedd election as a decisive contest between Plaid Cymru and Reform UK, arguing that Labour’s long-standing dominance in Wales is coming to an end. Speaking ahead of...

item.title: Six English clubs await last-16 opponents as Champions League knockout draw shapes route to Budapest final
item.description: The Champions League last-16 draw is set to determine not only the immediate opponents for six English clubs but also their potential path to the final in Budapest. For the first time, Arsenal, Manche...

item.title: Pisces Horoscope for February 27, 2026: Gradual Emotional Relief and Steady Progress
item.description: The horoscope for Pisces on February 27, 2026, suggests a gradual sense of relief as recent challenges begin to subside. Rather than a sudden shift, the day brings a steady emotional recovery supporte...

item.title: Juvenile Dinosaurs Lived Independently, Occupying Distinct Ecological Niches from Adults
item.description: New research from the University of Maryland led by Thomas R. Holtz Jr. reveals that juvenile dinosaurs were largely independent from their parents, unlike most modern mammals. Young dinosaurs, shortl...

item.title: Study Finds AI Models Resort to Nuclear Options in Simulated Wargames Amid Pentagon-Anthropic Tensions
item.description: A recent study by Professor Kenneth Payne at King's College London examined how advanced AI models from Google, OpenAI, and Anthropic behave in simulated wargames involving fictional nuclear-armed sup...

item.title: Hillary Clinton Gives Closed-Door Deposition to House Oversight Committee on Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: Hillary Clinton testified under oath in a closed-door deposition before the House Oversight Committee as part of its ongoing inquiry into Jeffrey Epstein and his network of powerful associates. During...

item.title: Prosecutors drop two charges against Alexander brothers in sex trafficking trial
item.description: Federal prosecutors in Manhattan have decided to drop two charges against the Alexander brothers, accused of drugging, raping, and trafficking numerous women in a decade-long campaign of violence. The...

item.title: US-Iran nuclear talks in Geneva overshadowed by sweeping American demands and threat of military action
item.description: Negotiations between the United States and Iran in Geneva have concluded with both sides offering cautiously optimistic but markedly different assessments of progress. A senior US official described t...

item.title: Royal Mail executives to face MPs over delays in letter deliveries
item.description: Royal Mail executives are to be summoned to appear before Parliament following widespread complaints regarding delays in letter delivery. The Business and Trade Committee had initially given the compa...

item.title: Premium Paper Towels Perform Best, but Budget Store Brands Offer Better Overall Value
item.description: Sky News’ Money team tested 19 different supermarket paper towel brands to determine whether premium products justify their higher prices compared with budget and store-brand alternatives. Testers spi...

item.title: How Love Is Blind Reflects Shifting Gender Dynamics in Modern Dating
item.description: When Netflix premiered Love Is Blind in 2020, the series stood out from other reality dating shows by prioritizing emotional connection over physical appearance. Early seasons featured awkward yet sin...

item.title: Akwesasne Mohawk Community Confronts Concerns Over Potential ICE Involvement Along the U.S.-Canada Border
item.description: Members of the Mohawk community of Akwesasne, a territory that spans the U.S.-Canada border across Ontario, Quebec, and New York State, are expressing concern over the potential presence of U.S. Immig...

item.title: Six Months On, Search Continues for Suspect in Fatal Shooting of Two Australian Police Officers
item.description: Six months after two police officers were fatally shot in Porepunkah, a small tourist town in Victoria, Australia, the search for the main suspect, Dezi Freeman, remains unresolved. Freeman, whose rea...

item.title: Titan and Saturn's Rings: A Collision Between Ancient Moons
item.description: New research suggests that Saturn's largest moon, Titan, may have formed from a massive collision between two earlier moons. This cosmic crash could explain Titan's unusual orbit and its surprisingly ...

item.title: Potential US-Russia Deal May Involve Nord Stream Pipeline and Ukraine Settlement
item.description: The Trump administration is reportedly exploring a settlement to the ongoing Ukraine war, with economic incentives for Russia and potential pressure on Ukraine’s leadership. One major aspect under dis...

item.title: Spain alerts WHO after suspected case of human-to-human swine flu transmission in Catalonia
item.description: Spain has notified the World Health Organisation (WHO) of a suspected case of human-to-human transmission of the A(H1N1)v swine flu variant in the region of Catalonia. According to regional health aut...

item.title: Investigation of Xiaomi Car Accident Reveals Doors Failed After Power Loss
item.description: A Xiaomi vehicle accident in Chengdu, China, has raised serious safety concerns after investigation reports revealed that the car’s doors could not be opened due to a low-voltage system failure. The c...

item.title: Driver jailed after gambling on phone causes crash that led to premature birth
item.description: A 30-year-old man has been jailed after causing a serious road collision while gambling on his mobile phone, resulting in a pregnant woman giving birth prematurely. Jack Bentley crashed into a station...

item.title: Family of Ruben Ray Martinez Seeks Transparency After Fatal ICE Shooting in Texas
item.description: The mother of 23-year-old Ruben Ray Martinez, who was fatally shot by an Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agent in South Padre Island, Texas, voted for Donald Trump in the 2024 presidential e...

item.title: Government Review Says Sizewell C Electricity Could Cost £120/MWh, Sparking Debate Over Consumer Impact
item.description: Electricity generated by the planned Sizewell C nuclear power station in Suffolk is expected to cost around £120 per megawatt hour (MWh), according to a Government review, nearly double current wholes...
